page_content:
Corequisite: MUSC603 and MUSC605.

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Music - Doctoral (Doctoral); Music - Master (Master's)).

MUSC614 Opera Techniques IV (2 Credits)

Continuation of MUSC 613. Techniques for opera performance: Scene Study IV and Movement IV.

Prerequisite: Minimum grade of B- in MUSC613.
